channel.title: Whatsapp on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Whatsapp on Arrans github.io

item.title: tinode/chat
item.description: Instant messaging platform. Backend in Go. Clients: Swift iOS, Java Android, JS webapp, scriptable command line; chatbots

item.title: xeco23/WasIstLos
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp desktop application for Linux.

item.title: gommzystudio/device-activity-tracker
item.description: A phone number can reveal whether a device is active, in standby or offline (and more). This PoC demonstrates how delivery receipts + RTT timing leak sensitive device-activity patterns. (WhatsApp / Signal)

item.title: WAClient/WALC
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp Desktop client for linux systems.
